tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Tabbed by Drew

Power Chords throughout (no third in chords), except in bridge. 
Technically, the Bb chords in verses are Bb/F. 

[Introduction]
[ch]F[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]
[ch]F[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                [ch]Bb[/ch]
Where I come from isn't all that great[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch]
My automobile is a piece of crap[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]               [ch]Bb[/ch]
My fashion sense is a little whack[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]E[/ch]
And my friends are just as screwy as me[/tab]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]        [ch]Bb[/ch]
I didn't go to boarding schools[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]        [ch]Bb[/ch]
Preppy girls never looked at me[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]
Why should they I ain't nobody[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]E[/ch]
Got nothing in my pocket[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]        
Beverly Hills - That's where I want to be![/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]
(Gimme Gimme) Living in Beverly Hills...[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]     
Beverly Hills - Rolling like a celebrity! [/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]
(Gimme Gimme) Living in Beverly Hills...[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]
Look at all those movie stars[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]
They're all so beautiful and clean[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]         
When the housemaids scrub the floors [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]E[/ch]
They get the spaces in between[/tab]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Bb/F[/ch]
I wanna live a life like that[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Bb/F[/ch]
I wanna be just like a king[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]        [ch]Bb/F[/ch]   
Take my picture by the pool [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]E[/ch]
Cause I'm the next big thing![/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]        
Beverly Hills - That's where I want to be![/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]
(Gimme Gimme) Living in Beverly Hills...[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]     
Beverly Hills - Rolling like a celebrity! [/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]
(Gimme Gimme) Living in Beverly Hills...[/tab]

[Instrumental Break](same as intro 2X)
[ch]F[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]
[ch]F[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]

[ch]F[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]
[ch]F[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]

[Bridge] ([finger picked, not power chords)
[tab][ch]F[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]Bb[/ch]
The truth is...I don't stand a chance[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                [ch]Bb[/ch]
Its something that you're born into...[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G/B[/ch]                [ch]Bb[/ch] 
And I just don't belong...[/tab]

[Verse] (in power chords)
[tab]([ch]E[/ch])  [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]                  
No I don't - I'm just a no class, beat down fool[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]
And I will always be that way[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]
I might as well enjoy my life[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]E[/ch]
And watch the stars play[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]        
Beverly Hills - That's where I want to be![/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]
(Gimme Gimme) Living in Beverly Hills...[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]     
Beverly Hills - Rolling like a celebrity! [/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]
(Gimme Gimme) Living in Beverly Hills...[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]
Beverly Hills...[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]
Beverly Hills![/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]
Beverly Hills![/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]  
Beverly HIlls!  Living in Beverly Hills.[/tab]
